title: pinned-unicode cross-host
manager: The pinned-Unicode guarantee from v7 verified across the whole fleet — every host agrees on normalization, case, and number formatting, checked by the differential CI. This is the T3 tier's substance: string and number handling is the classic place independent implementations silently disagree, so proving cross-host agreement on the pinned Unicode tables is what lets a machine's text behavior be trusted everywhere it runs, not just on the reference host.
cs: pinned-unicode + number pinning verified fleet-wide (#815); the T3 tier substance; the differential CI proves cross-host string/number agreement; builds on the v7 pinned normalization (W6.58).
